CustomField.description: Master opt-in for the Phase 2 Watcher digest. When non-null, the daily DeliveryHubScheduler.enqueueWatcherDigestIfDue tick is active. Null = entire Watcher silent (no DML, no callout, no WatcherDigest__c row). Defaults to null on install — Glen flips it on his org to activate. Subscriber orgs see Watcher silent until they set this field.
CustomField.label: Enable Watcher Digest
